title: Understand your monthly invoice
body:
# Understand your monthly invoice

Your monthly invoice is available under **Billing > Invoices**.

Each invoice lists:
- **Subscription fee** — your current plan's base cost.
- **Usage charges** — any metered usage beyond your plan's included allowance.
- **Taxes** — calculated based on your billing address.
- **Credits or discounts** — applied automatically if you have an active promotion.

Invoices are generated on the same day each month, matching your original subscription start date. If a charge looks incorrect, see the refund article or contact support with the invoice number.
